title: Balsamic Citrus Bites
description: A low-calorie-friendly Argentinean dish featuring balsamic vinegar and citrus in a one-pot recipe that is dense and tangy.
instructions: Zest the lemons and oranges, and juice them separately.
In a non-stick skillet, lightly grease with a bit of olive oil.
Add lemon zest and orange juice to the skillet over medium heat. Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Stir in balsamic vinegar, ginger, and basil leaves. Cook for an additional minute to let the flavors meld.
In a small bowl, mix almond flour with a bit of water to make a thin paste.
Pour the batter into the skillet and spread evenly using a spatula. Allow it to cook on both sides until golden brown (about 3-4 minutes per side).
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
